title: Car managment system with price prediction
description: Developed a car managment platforme enabling users to buy, sell and manage cars with prediction model.

detaille.title: Car management system with price prediction
detaille.intro: This project is a comprehensive car management system that allows users to buy, sell, and manage their cars efficiently. The platform includes a price prediction model that helps users determine the optimal price for their vehicles based on various factors such as make, model, year, mileage, and market trends.
detaille.purpose: The Car Management System is designed to streamline the car listing and selling process, offering a predictive pricing feature based on historical data. The aim was to allow users to confidently price their cars or evaluate potential purchases. The challenge was integrating a machine learning model seamlessly into a web application, while ensuring the system was scalable and user-friendly. The project also needed a reliable backend to manage user data, car listings, and the machine learning model. As the system handles a growing amount of car data, scalability and performance were key concerns throughout development.

title: Resilient Failure Prediction System for Autonomous Trains

title: chess game
description: Developed a fully interactive, web-based chess game using modern web technologies. This project showcases proficiency in front-end development, state management, and interactive UI design .
